bloodStrikeUpdates.title: Striker Adjustments: ALONDRA
bloodStrikeUpdates.desc: Alondra's performance is a bit too dominant. Her jetpack lets her change direction midair multiple times at very low cost, making it extremely frustrating for opponents to aim at her. Balance changes now live.

bloodStrikeUpdates.title: Blood Strike × The Seven Deadly Sins Collab
bloodStrikeUpdates.desc: The Seven Deadly Sins crossover is now live! From 4/3 to 5/3, participate in special game modes and events to get multiple exclusive crossover cosmetics for free. Limited-time only — don't miss out!

bloodStrikeUpdates.title: 2nd Anniversary Celebration — Ascendant Season
bloodStrikeUpdates.desc: BloodStrike 2nd Ascendant is officially enabled! Multiple limited-time events are live. Win exclusive Limited gun skins, Striker skins, and a massive amount of Gold. Celebrate 2 years of Blood Strike!

bloodStrikeUpdates.title: BR Mid-Season Update — Wildcard System
bloodStrikeUpdates.desc: The tactical Dimension gets another upgrade! Breaking away from fixed combat playstyles, we're introducing a brand-new in-match system — [Wildcard]. Richer, more strategic combat experience for all Strikers.

bloodStrikeUpdates.title: Blood Strike × BLEACH: Thousand-Year Blood War
bloodStrikeUpdates.desc: BLEACH collab Event Now Live! From 2/1 to 2/28, participate in BLEACH Gameplay and Events to obtain multiple BLEACH collab skins. Limited-time only — don't miss out!

bloodStrikeUpdates.title: Weapon Adjustments: AR97 Reticle Fix
bloodStrikeUpdates.desc: The reticle sway of the AR97 made it difficult to perform at long range. This version significantly optimizes the AR97's firing reticle sway for better precision at distance.

bloodStrikeUpdates.title: Road to Mythic — Season 13 Ranked Event
bloodStrikeUpdates.desc: The climb to greatness begins now. With Season 13, we launch the Road to Mythic event: prove your skill, dominate the leaderboards, and win exclusive rewards including the Golden Butterfly Knife, gold, and a rare title.
